meaning: n.马刀,骑兵,骑兵队vt.用马刀砍或杀
examples: I remember playing as a lad in France burying my little toy saber.
The disappearance of megafauna in America—mammoths, saber-toothed cats, giant sloths, among others—happened relatively soon after the arrival of human beings, about 13,000 years ago.
See "Odd Saber-Toothed Beast discovered-preyed on... Plants?"
Apparently you also came up with the idea of the light saber for Star Wars?
"It was awesome, the bow lit up like a light saber, " said Adrian Cockerill.
